title: Love After World Domination
sourceNotes: Single-cour 12-episode TV anime (Project No.9, 2022). Manga complete at 37 chapters across 6 volumes, though the series was cancelled and ended without a full narrative conclusion. Fan continue-reading guides indicate the anime adapts all but the last chapter of Volume 4, i.e. chapters 1-24; the remaining chapters were never adapted. No distinct named story arcs, so broad season/volume-based entries are used.
